consequence: The model is reproducible but necessarily incomplete.
recommended_response: Document all sources and keep the workflow reproducible.

consequence: The model explains observed outcomes but is not a structural supervisory model.
recommended_response: Explain the model as a benchmark, not as an official engine.

consequence: The project cannot reproduce Federal Reserve confidential modelling layers.
Detailed loan-level, trading, operational and management-action data are not observed.
Some banks may have special features not captured by public variables.
recommended_response: Report largest errors and model risk rankings.

consequence: A small number of observations can have large errors.
recommended_response: Discuss tail risk separately from average fit.

consequence: Relative rankings may change under alternative specifications.
recommended_response: Use sensitivity checks and alternative thresholds.

consequence: Some technical details are simplified for teaching and transparency.
